FFMPEG VERIFICATION
-------------------
ffmpeg version 8.1-full_build-www.gyan.dev (Gyan.FFmpeg via winget). Configuration line confirms `--enable-libvorbis` AND `--enable-libmp3lame` compiled in. libavcodec 62.28.100, libavutil 60.26.100. PATH resolution working in bash subshell.

-------------------------------
| # | path                                                            | before_bytes | after_bytes | bitrate_kbps | encoder    | decode_validation |
|---|-----------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|-------------|--------------|------------|-------------------|

Decode validation: each output run through `ffmpeg -v error -i <out.ogg> -f null -` and exit code captured. All 5 returned exit 0 with no stderr — outputs are well-formed Vorbis streams.

Effective bitrates (from muxer stats): tracks 1/2/3 ~112-114 kbps observed (target 128, libvorbis VBR floor for these signals); track 4 ~72 kbps observed (target 96, short stinger); track 5 ~44 kbps observed (target 96, very short stinger with high muxing-overhead ratio of 41% on 2.6s of audio). Bitrate flags were honored — actual rates reflect libvorbis VBR behavior on short/sparse content.
